---
name: 🐛 Bug Report / Broken Link
about: Report a broken link, outdated resource, or incorrect information
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 What is broken?

**Type of issue:**
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated resource
- [ ] Typo / grammar error
- [ ] Formatting issue
- [ ] Code snippet not working

## 📍 Where is the bug?

**File / Section:**
> e.g., `docs/phases/02-networking.md` → Section "Wireshark basics"

**Line or content (if applicable):**
> e.g., Link to "xyz.com" returns 404

## ✅ What should it be?

**Expected / correct information:**
> e.g., The correct link should be "abc.com/resource"

## 📝 Additional context

> Add any additional context, screenshots, or information here.
